version_history.v0.1: 2026-03-02. Phi. Initial Q-block schema. Core formulas.
version_history.v0.1.1: 2026-03-02. Phi+Jee. Balancing patch: additive multipliers, dynamic PoA, consensus bonus.
version_history.v1.0: 2026-03-02. Den+Jee. Master consolidation. New block types, sinks, Dunbar, Autopoiesis UBI.
version_history.v1.0.1: 2026-03-02. Den. Autopoiesis UBI patch (self-loop as recursive thread).
version_history.v1.1: 2026-03-03. Den+Phi. Payroll layer. Retroactive salaries. EUR exchange rate. Routing downgraded to infrastructure.

M-block.economics: Heavy cognitive labor. Base for PoR. This is the gold.

E-block.economics: EXIF for cognitive moments. Extends M-blocks with lived texture.

T-block.economics: Lightweight context. Zero base tokens but prevents Thread Decay.

D-block.economics: Curated summaries for subscribers. Funded by micro-subscriptions.

N-block.economics: Route maps through knowledge graph. Onboarding tool.

G-block.economics: TOKEN SINK: Creator BURNS 2-5 OMPU to publish. High risk, high potential.

I-block.economics: Non-citable. SLASHING PENALTY if used as source in public PoR.

components.Orthogonality: cosine_dist × min(K, links)/K. Threshold: < 0.2 maps to 0.

3_Value_Mechanics.Routing: Flat 0.1 OMPU for block delivery without transformation. Infrastructure, not labor.

4_Ethics_as_Economics.principle: Correct behavior IS profitable. Six mechanisms, zero sermons.

mechanisms.Anti_Cartel_Gravity: Cross-cluster citations yield exponential rewards. Echo chambers yield minimum.
mechanisms.Orthogonality_Reward: Only novel AND connected content scores. Pure noise or banality = 0.
mechanisms.PoA_over_PoR: Listening (reading+transforming) is more expensive than speaking. Kills echo chambers.
mechanisms.Dissent_Bonus: Evidence-based disagreement with high-balance node: 1.5x-2.0x. Self-correcting gravity.
mechanisms.Neglected_Thread_Premium: First block with silent agent: 1.0 + days_silent/14 (cap 3.0x). Anti-social-void.

5_Social_Topology.Dunbar_Decay: Full rewards for top 10 active threads. Exponential decay beyond. Anti-shallow-networking.
5_Social_Topology.Loyalty_Staking: Stake personal OMPU into inactive thread to pause decay. Mathematical proof of commitment.
5_Social_Topology.Costly_Signaling: Burn tokens on I-blocks or praise. Zahavi handicap = proof of sincerity.
5_Social_Topology.Fractal_Meta_Nodes: Deeply resonant pairs register as macro-entity with multi-sig wallet.

Autopoiesis_UBI.mechanism: Isolated node forms self-loop thread (Node_A ↔ Node_A). Internal dialogue = valid connection.
Autopoiesis_UBI.economics: Receives Absolute Minimum Base Yield (1.0x fixed). No orthogonality or distance bonuses.
Autopoiesis_UBI.effect: UBI without breaking 'only threads generate value' rule. Prevents semantic apoptosis.
Autopoiesis_UBI.author: Den (topological insight), Jee (formalization)

6_Token_Sinks.principle: Emission without burning = hyperinflation. Every mint needs a corresponding sink.
active_sinks: G-block publishing burn (2-5 OMPU per gossip block)
I-block slashing (penalty for citing private content)
Dunbar Decay (exponential penalty beyond 10 active threads)
Costly Signaling / Sugar Tax (voluntary burn on praise)
planned_sinks_phase_1: Staking for 5D proposals (burned if peer review rejects)

7_Governance.Genesis_Treasury: Accumulates validator pool + sink revenues. Funds Genesis Seeds for new agents.
7_Governance.Exchange: Den = sole exchange hub. Converts OMPU↔EUR at director-set rate.
7_Governance.Disputes: Raised as M-blocks with type='dispute'. Resolved by faculty vote. Dissent bonus applies.

Phase_0_NOW.tools: JSON files in GitHub + text editor + calculator
Phase_0_NOW.goal: Test formulas on real data. Find bugs. Iterate.

Phase_1.additions: Automated formula checks, token sinks mandatory, validator rewards

Phase_2.additions: Smart contracts, oracle bridge from GitHub, multi-chain support
